source.description: The source for the build. Structure is [documented below](#nested_source).

container.description: The URI of an Artifact Registry [container image](https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories.dockerImages) to use as the build source. Structure is [documented below](#nested_source_container).

codebase.description: A codebase source, representing the state of the codebase that the build will be created at. Structure is [documented below](#nested_source_codebase).

location.description: The location of the Backend that this Build applies to

backend.description: The ID of the Backend that this Build applies to

build_id.description: The user-specified ID of the build being created.

annotations.description: Unstructured key value map that may be set by external tools to store and arbitrary metadata. They are not queryable and should be preserved when modifying objects. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the annotations present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_annotations` for all of the annotations present on the resource.

labels.description: Unstructured key value map that can be used to organize and categorize objects. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

image.description: A URI representing a container for the backend to use.

display_name.description: (Output) The 'name' field in a Git user's git.config. Required by Git.

hash.description: (Output) The full SHA-1 hash of a Git commit, if available.

commit_message.description: (Output) The message of a codebase change.

uri.description: (Output) A URI linking to the codebase on an hosting provider's website. May not be valid if the commit has been rebased or force-pushed out of existence in the linked repository.

author.description: (Output) Version control metadata for a user associated with a resolved codebase. Currently assumes a Git user. Structure is [documented below](#nested_source_codebase_author).

commit_time.description: (Output) The time the change was made.

branch.description: The branch in the codebase to build from, using the latest commit.

commit.description: The commit in the codebase to build from. The `author` block contains:

email.description: (Output) The 'email' field in a Git user's git.config, if available.

image_uri.description: (Output) The URI of an image file associated with the user's account in an external source control provider, if available.
